message:
fix(raptorq): guard against zero symbol_size in source_symbols and decoder

Add .max(1) guard to prevent division by zero when symbol_size is 0:

- config.rs: RaptorQConfig::source_symbols() now clamps divisor to >= 1
- decode.rs: RaptorQDecoder::new() applies the same guard when computing
  k from ObjectTransmissionInformation

A zero symbol_size should never occur in valid configurations, but this
prevents a panic if malformed metadata is encountered during decoding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
